title: Leetcode 416. Partition Equal Subset Sum
shortDescription: Determine whether the array can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum — equivalently, check if there exists a subset that sums to half the total. This is a classic 0/1 subset-sum / knapsack problem solvable with DP or bitset techniques since total sum ≤ 200*100.

Leetcode 416. Partition Equal Subset Sum

Determine whether the array can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum — equivalently, check if there exists a subset that sums to half the total. This is a classic 0/1 subset-sum / knapsack problem solvable with DP or bitset techniques since total sum ≤ 200*100.

Asked at:

Google
